query:
-- Encerrar preços de médicos do responsável antigo (90001) na PACSML
UPDATE billing_doctor_unit_prices 
SET ends_at = '2026-05-18 00:00:00'
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 90001 AND unit_id = 210001 AND ends_at IS NULL;

-- Migrar cada preço de médico para o novo responsável (120001)
-- Médico Studio Barra7 (doctor_user_id=1) com R$ 25,00
INSERT INTO billing_doctor_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (120001, 210001, 1, '25.00', '2026-05-18 00:00:00', NULL, 1, NOW());

-- Verificar se há outros médicos com preço no responsável antigo (30001) também
SELECT bdp.*, u.username as doctor_name
FROM billing_doctor_unit_prices bdp
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = bdp.doctor_user_id
WHERE bdp.unit_id = 210001 AND bdp.ends_at IS NULL
ORDER BY bdp.financial_responsible_id;
